annapolis.neighborhoods: Downtown, Eastport, East Street, West Annapolis
annapolis.meetingHighlights: Naval Academy town recovery with waterfront meetings; diverse maritime community; strong sailing-sobriety culture.
annapolis.transitInfo: Annapolis Transit buses; BWI Marshall Airport (BWI) accessible; State Capital location.

baltimore.neighborhoods: Inner Harbor, Federal Hill, Fells Point, Canton, Mt. Vernon, Hampden
baltimore.meetingHighlights: Major recovery community with meetings throughout city neighborhoods; strong traditions in Fells Point and Mt. Vernon; 24/7 meeting culture.
baltimore.transitInfo: MTA Light Rail, Metro, and buses; BWI Marshall Airport (BWI); Amtrak service.

rockville.neighborhoods: Downtown Rockville, King Farm, Town Center, West End
rockville.meetingHighlights: Suburban DC recovery with professional community meetings; diverse schedule serving commuters; strong Montgomery County network.
rockville.transitInfo: Metro Red Line; Ride On buses; I-270 corridor; close to DC.

frederick.neighborhoods: Downtown Frederick, Carroll Creek, North Frederick, Monocacy area
frederick.meetingHighlights: Historic downtown recovery community; growing suburban meetings; strong service tradition in Frederick County.
frederick.transitInfo: TransIT buses; Frederick Municipal Airport (FDK); I-70 and I-270 access.

hagerstown.areaDescription: Hagerstown and Washington County in western Maryland
hagerstown.neighborhoods: Downtown Hagerstown, City Park area, Halfway, Smithsburg, Funkstown, Robinwood
hagerstown.meetingHighlights: Western Maryland recovery hub with meetings in downtown churches and along Dual Highway; serves the tri-state area of Maryland, West Virginia, and Pennsylvania; strong evening and weekend speaker meetings.
hagerstown.transitInfo: County Commuter bus service; Hagerstown Regional Airport (HGR); I-70 and I-81 interchange provides regional access.

salisbury.areaDescription: Salisbury and the Eastern Shore of Maryland
salisbury.neighborhoods: Downtown Salisbury, Salisbury University area, North Salisbury, Fruitland, Delmar
salisbury.meetingHighlights: Eastern Shore recovery hub serving Wicomico County and surrounding Delmarva communities; meetings near Salisbury University and downtown; welcoming fellowship with evening discussion and step-study groups.
salisbury.transitInfo: Shore Transit provides local and regional bus service across the Lower Eastern Shore; Salisbury-Ocean City Wicomico Regional Airport (SBY); US-13 and US-50 provide regional access.

gaithersburg.areaDescription: Montgomery County city in the I-270 corridor
gaithersburg.neighborhoods: Olde Towne, Kentlands, Lakelands, Washingtonian Center, East Deer Park, Montgomery Village vicinity
gaithersburg.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve upper Montgomery County with strong access from surrounding suburban communities.
gaithersburg.transitInfo: Ride On buses, MARC Brunswick Line nearby, and I-270 support regional travel.

bowie.areaDescription: Prince George's County city between Washington and Annapolis
bowie.neighborhoods: Old Town Bowie, Belair, Pointer Ridge, Whitehall, Bowie Town Center area, Collington
bowie.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve a broad suburban population in central Prince George's County with reliable weekly options.
bowie.transitInfo: TheBus and Metrobus routes serve parts of Bowie; US-50, US-301, and the MARC Penn Line nearby support access.

cumberland.areaDescription: Western Maryland city in the Appalachian region
cumberland.neighborhoods: Downtown, South End, North End, LaVale vicinity, Narrows Park area, Washington Street corridor
cumberland.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the tri-state mountain region with dependable local attendance and regional accessibility.
cumberland.transitInfo: Allegany County Transit, Amtrak Capitol Limited, and I-68 connect Cumberland to the wider region.
